{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Charity's father
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity's father]] is about to ascend.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
